targets.query:
from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="power" and r.unit=="cal_F07F8C" and r._field=="w")
|> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty:false)
|> keep(columns:["_time","_value","phase"])

from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="cal_meter" and r.unit=="cal_F07F8C" and r._field=="w")
|> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty:false)
|> map(fn:(r)=> ({r with phase:"SDM"}))
|> keep(columns:["_time","_value","phase"])

panels.title: Box CT power (W) vs SDM reference

targets.query:
from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="cal_dev" and r.unit=="cal_F07F8C" and r._field=="w_pct")
|> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty:false)
|> keep(columns:["_time","_value","phase"])

panels.description: Per-hour energy deviation: (Σbox − ΣSDM)/ΣSDM × 100 per phase, computed from summed energies (not averaged per-minute %). Hourly buckets (~45 box counts) cut the 0.01 kWh quantization noise to ~±2%; averages to ~±1% over the test. See cumulative panel for the clean view.

targets.query:
box = from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="cal_box" and r.unit=="cal_F07F8C" and r._field=="dkwh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty:false)
  |> keep(columns:["_time","_value","phase"])
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["phase"], valueColumn:"_value")

sdm = from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="cal_meter" and r.unit=="cal_F07F8C" and r._field=="dkwh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty:false)
  |> keep(columns:["_time","_value"])
  |> rename(columns:{_value:"SDM"})

join(tables:{b:box, s:sdm}, on:["_time"])
  |> map(fn:(r)=> ({ _time: r._time,
      R: if r.SDM > 0.0 then (r.R - r.SDM)/r.SDM*100.0 else 0.0,
      S: if r.SDM > 0.0 then (r.S - r.SDM)/r.SDM*100.0 else 0.0,
      T: if r.SDM > 0.0 then (r.T - r.SDM)/r.SDM*100.0 else 0.0 }))

panels.title: CT energy deviation vs SDM (hourly, %)

targets.query:
from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="cal_meter" and r.unit=="cal_F07F8C" and (r._field=="v" or r._field=="a" or r._field=="w" or r._field=="pf"))
|> last()
|> keep(columns:["_field","_value"])

panels.description: Running total of energy (cumulative Σ dkwh, kWh) over the selected range. R/S/T from cal_box, SDM from cal_meter. Lines track if the CTs match the reference; vertical gaps = drift. Resets to 0 at range start (relative, not since test start).

targets.query:
from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="cal_box" and r.unit=="cal_F07F8C" and r._field=="dkwh")
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty:false)
|> cumulativeSum(columns:["_value"])
|> keep(columns:["_time","_value","phase"])

from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="cal_meter" and r.unit=="cal_F07F8C" and r._field=="dkwh")
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty:false)
|> cumulativeSum(columns:["_value"])
|> map(fn:(r)=> ({r with phase:"SDM"}))
|> group(columns:["phase"])
|> keep(columns:["_time","_value","phase"])

panels.title: Cumulative energy — box CTs (R/S/T) vs SDM
